subcodes.first_line: O thou candle of the spiritual gathering! For some time no breeze hath wafted from that supernal Paradise, nor hath any melody from that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع انجمن روحانیان مدتیست که نسیمی از آن بهشت برین نوزیده و نغمه از آن
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
